backend/main.mo: Motoko backend defining categories, ingredients, meals, and per‑user daily records with functions to add records and query ingredients, categories, and saved records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing features, related files, components, tests, and metadata for release and verification tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of various frontend source files for reference or documentation.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based style definitions including OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point defining metadata, icons, root mount element, and script loader for the frontend.
frontend/LIVE_URL.md: Documentation file showing the live production URL and brief usage instructions for the deployed app.
frontend/PRODUCTION_SMOKE_TEST.md: Checklist for verifying production functionality including UI load, backend connectivity, form actions, record saving, history, and exports.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring TanStack Router routes and error boundaries, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout with header navigation, Version 11 label, content container, and footer attribution.
frontend/src/components/BackendConnectio: Displays a detailed backend connection error card with retry actions and troubleshooting steps.
Defines ingredient categories, a predefined ingredient list, and a helper to filter ingredients by category.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance using react-query, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorDiagnostics.t: Provides reactive diagnostics for the actor query and a retry function by inspecting the react-query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyForm.ts: Manages daily ingredient form state, updating fields, validating entries, and resetting the form.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context, handling identity loading, login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Wraps backend calls to fetch and add daily records, including encoding and decoding ingredient entries.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS setup and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/DailyEntryPage.tsx: Renders the daily entry form page, handling saving, copying, backend readiness checks, and retry logic.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays a list of saved daily records with loading/error states and navigation to individual record details.
frontend/src/pages/RecordDetailPage.tsx: Shows a single saved record with options to export CSV, copy plain text, and navigate back to history.
frontend/src/types/dailyForm.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for ingredient form data and saved daily record structures.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Generates and downloads a CSV file from a SavedDailyRecord using browser APIs.
frontend/src/utils/recordPlainText.ts: Converts a SavedDailyRecord into formatted plain text grouped by categories for vendor messaging.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS theme, colors, animations, and content scanning paths.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, requirements, issues, and deployment state information.
